A.evidence: Prose is very faithful with figures/captions and equations (1)-(2) in LaTeX, but no visible tables are reproduced and one footnote is escaped as <sup>&</sup>lt;sup>2</sup>.

B.evidence: Mostly faithful prose and reading order, but math loses bold/vector notation and equation numbers, no visible tables are present, and some joins like 152layer/fullyconvolutional remain.
